content_html:
15th April 2026

This plugin was using the 

ds_csrftoken
cookie as part of a custom signed URL, which needed upgrading now that Datasette 1.0a27 no longer sets that cookie.

  • The Axios supply chain attack used individually targeted social engineering- 3rd April 2026
